text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, after Manhattan Cafe and I have seized
a number of victories...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whoosh!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Look... The wind is blowing something around.
What could it be?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I pick up the paper tumbling about on the
ground... and find that it looks familiar.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Isn't that... the hot spring ticket we won in the
raffle the other day?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
None of this makes any sense. What's this ticket
doing here? I know I put it somewhere safe...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Wait... we have a problem. We have to use this
hot spring ticket before it's too late...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Is something going to happen? Has she seen some
kind of ill omen?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: It is almost upon us... The expiration date.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...And back to the present. After quickly
arranging some time off, we head towards the hot
springs.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe sure is taking her time in the hot
spring. Just as I start to worry...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Trainer... My friend...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: She drowned in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
She sank beneath the waters... I suppose she
wasn't used to the springs...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not being used to the hot springs is one thing,
but drowning is another entirely...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
She's fine... I don't think she needs air... She
waved to me as she went down.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
But... I felt a little lonely. Since she's... always with
me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe looks apprehensive. While I'm
thinking of ways to help...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Trainer... You're quite similar to my friend, aren't
you?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Just for today... in this room, could you... stand in
for my friend?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I nod without saying a word, then try to imagine
I'm her friend.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Hehehe... The food is delicious...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Would you like some?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Wait... Can you even eat?
choice_data_list: I... I don't think I can...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I didn't think so... You never usually eat...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Can I eat yours instead?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Do you want it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I struggle to ignore my hunger pangs and stay in
character as an inhuman entity.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
It's okay... You don't have to pretend anymore.
You're not my friend...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
But even though you're not, I've come to realize
that's for the best...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
When you're with me... I have a different kind of
fun...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I hope we can talk about many more things
together...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Freed from my acting duties, I feel a little more
relaxed. It looks like I'm safe to go on being
myself.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Listen closely. Here, come to the
window...
choice_data_list: Are we listening for the insects?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
No... I can hear something dragging itself out of a
body of water...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like... My friend... has gotten out. She's
coming this way...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Squelch, squelch, squelch...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, she's almost here... Look, through the
window...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Now that the three of us are all together... What
shall we do?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Don't worry... The night is young...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In a panic, I grab the cushion I'm sitting on and
put it over my head. After that... everything's a
blur.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But I sense that Manhattan Cafe and I have
formed an irreplaceable bond during our time
together.
